title: prosaptia geluensis
intro: Prosaptia geluensis, also known as the Philippine fern, is a rare and endangered species of plant native to the Philippines. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Prosaptia geluensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
